zh.title: 赫拉利预言全集 - 《未来简史》《今日简史》中的14条未来预测与验证 | Harari Predictions

en.title: Harari Predictions - 14 Forecasts from Homo Deus & 21 Lessons | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Israeli historian Yuval Noah Harari's 14 predictions from Homo Deus, 21 Lessons for the 21st Century, and public lectures. Topics include AI replacing jobs, dataism, biometric surveillance, useless class, and algorithmic authority.
